query:
SELECT pv.variant_code, pv.variant_name, pv.selling_price_fob, vp.selling_price_fob_l1, vp.selling_price_fob_l2, vp.selling_price_fob_l3, vp.is_current
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN variant_pricing vp ON pv.id = vp.variant_id AND vp.is_current = true
WHERE pv.variant_code = 'DC-001-GRY-V033'
LIMIT 5;

FROM product_variants pv
